overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a cowboy character walking through a grassy residential neighborhood at night. The character moves from a dark tree-lined field toward a Victorian mansion, eventually entering its illuminated patio area.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy field with scattered oak trees

events.description: character briefly turns right toward a lit cobblestone path before continuing forward through the field
wooden split-rail fence comes into view on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through grassy field toward the residential area with lit windows visible in the distance

entered.detail: large oak trees with dense canopies silhouetted against the night sky
open grassy area with tall grass underfoot
bushes with red flowers flanking the path entrance
rustic wooden fence marking property boundary

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dark grassy field scattered with large oak trees. Red flowering bushes mark the starting area. As the character progresses, a wooden split-rail fence appears on the right, marking the edge of a residential property with distant lit windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential lane with Victorian houses and wooden fencing

events.description: passing closer to gas lamp posts illuminating the path with warm light
large Victorian mansion with stone walls becomes prominent ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the fence line parallel to Victorian houses with lit porches and windows

entered.detail: two-story Victorian house with wraparound porch and lit windows
ornate black gas lamp casting warm yellow light
low stone retaining wall along the property edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wooden fence line with Victorian houses visible on the right. Gas lamps provide warm illumination against the cool night. The scene transitions from open field to a more structured residential lane with stone walls and manicured properties.

events.description: passing through stone gate pillars onto wooden patio deck

agents.ego_description: walking up stone steps onto the wooden patio deck toward the mansion entrance

entered.detail: large three-story Victorian mansion with multiple lit windows and wraparound balcony
elevated wooden deck with steps leading up to house entrance
white wooden tables and chairs arranged on the patio
stone pillars marking the entrance to the property

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and enters the patio area of a large Victorian mansion. Passing through stone gate pillars, the scene shifts from grassy yard to wooden deck furnished with outdoor tables and chairs. Warm artificial light from the mansion windows illuminates the patio against the dark night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dark, wild field into the refined, illuminated grounds of a Victorian estate. It begins among red flowering bushes and large oak trees in a dark grassy expanse, moving forward until a wooden split-rail fence emerges to mark the boundary of a residential property. As the character follows this fence line, the environment shifts from open nature to a structured lane where gas lamps cast a warm glow against the cool night and manicured properties appear. The scene then expands as the camera passes through stone gate pillars, transitioning from the grassy yard onto a wooden deck. Finally, the movement concludes in the mansion's patio area, where outdoor furniture is bathed in the warm artificial light spilling from the house windows.
